description:
C.4 regression fixture. Proves that target="definitions" continues to surface test-helper symbols even with the reranker enabled, per the role-aware-reweighting design in 2026-05-15-daemon-split-and-search-reranker-design.md §C.4.

Each query targets a known test-helper symbol in julie's own codebase. The acceptance bar is: the expected symbol appears in the top 10 definition results with the default exclude_tests behavior (none = include tests for definition search).

Note: queries are scoped to symbols that exist in the current pre-built fixture (target/julie-fixture). If you rename a helper or add new ones (e.g. B.3's InProcessDaemon), rebuild the fixture: `cargo test --lib build_julie_fixture -- --ignored --nocapture`, then expand this fixture to cover the additions.

queries.description: Fixture builder struct used across dogfood tests
Async helper that constructs a JulieServerHandler from the fixture DB
Wrapper that calls text_search_impl with target=definitions
Wrapper that calls text_search_impl with target=content
Assertion helper used by dogfood tests
Assertion helper that checks a path-pattern appears in results
Result formatter used in test diagnostic output
Ignored test that rebuilds the fixture DB
Generic test env setup used by get_context pipeline tests
